error_signature: time trigger doesn't fire at scheduled times
title: Time trigger not firing consistently
symptom: The time-triggered workflows sometimes do not activate at the scheduled times, while manual execution works perfectly.
root_cause: The issue may stem from incorrect timezone settings in the n8n environment. If the timezone is not set correctly, the time trigger may not align with the expected schedule, causing it to miss activations.
fix_steps: Open your n8n environment configuration file (env file or compose.yaml).
Add or update the line: GENERIC_TIMEZONE=Your/Timezone (e.g., GENERIC_TIMEZONE=Asia/Jakarta).
Save the changes and restart n8n.
Test the time trigger by scheduling it a few minutes ahead to verify it activates.
agent_instruction: Set the GENERIC_TIMEZONE variable in your environment configuration to your local timezone.
